title: Responsive Hero Section

statement.markdown:
{"markdown":"# Responsive Hero Section

Create a responsive hero section that adapts to different screen sizes.

The hero section should have the following layout on desktop and tablet devices:

1. A header container with a logo and navigation menu.
2. A hero image with a brief introduction and a call-to-action button.

On mobile devices, the hero section should have a simplified layout with the logo and navigation menu hidden and the hero image taking up the full screen height.

### Requirements

1. The hero section should take up at least 75% of the viewport height on desktop devices.
2. The header container should be fixed to the top of the viewport on desktop devices.
3. The hero image should be a responsive background image that adapts to different screen sizes.
4. The introduction and call-to-action button should be centered on the hero image.
5. The hero section should be accessible on all devices with a minimum screen size of 320px."}

constraints: You can use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
You cannot use any external libraries or frameworks other than Tailwind CSS.
Your solution must be responsive and work on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

starterCode.html:
header:
  • Logo
  • Navigation
hero:

Introduction

footer:
Copyright 2024
body: {{header}} {{hero}} {{footer}}

gradingCriteria.description: The hero section takes up at least 75% of the viewport height on desktop devices.
The header container is fixed to the top of the viewport on desktop devices.
The hero image is a responsive background image that adapts to different screen sizes.
The introduction and call-to-action button are centered on the hero image.
The hero section is accessible on all devices with a minimum screen size of 320px.
